description: Synthetic routes used by the mock lab to validate whether metadata-only signals can separate managed optimization, private benchmark readiness, no-action, and no-go cases.

signals: low cached input share despite stable template
scenarios.why_it_matters: Tests whether metadata can identify spend that should be fixed on the managed API before any private inference benchmark.
Tests whether metadata can identify routes ready for a private inference benchmark without inspecting payloads.
Tests whether the meter avoids over-recommending work on low-value routes.
Tests whether the meter blocks migration recommendations when no quality oracle exists.
